remember: Students will be able to recall the plot, characters, and key events of the story.
Students will be able to identify and explain the themes of the story.
Students will be able to describe the setting and atmosphere of the story.
understand: Students will be able to explain the author's purpose and tone in the story.
Students will be able to analyze the character of Ravi and his relationships with others.
Students will be able to understand the symbolism and imagery in the story.
apply: Students will be able to apply literary devices such as metaphor, simile, and personification to understand the story.
Students will be able to use textual evidence to support their analysis of the story.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the story with other texts or real-life situations.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the power dynamics and social issues presented in the story.
Students will be able to evaluate the character development and plot progression in the story.
Students will be able to identify and explain the author's use of language and style.

ncert_objectives: To understand the theme of the story and its relevance to real life.
To analyze the character of Ravi and his relationships with others.
To identify and explain literary devices used in the story.
board_exam_objectives: To recall the plot and characters of the story.
To identify and explain the themes and symbolism in the story.
To analyze the language and style used by the author.
